(In reply to Johannes Lundberg from comment #3)
> I might have confused the purpose of mesa-libs vs mesa-dri. 

I'd rather consolidate Mesa into one port. The existing separation is hard to maintain.

> VMware does not support sparc of mips so it's no problem disabling it for them.

What about freedreno on aarch64 and armv7?
